title: <div>A teacher was decapitated in Paris last night for showing a cartoon prophet
content:
A teacher was decapitated in Paris last night for showing a cartoon prophet in his class. This isn’t the first time people have died for that magazine cover.

Extremism comes in many different forms, but one of the most popular flavors is religious fundamentalism. Which is why so many of us shudder at the new cult member’s appointment to the supremest of courts.

Let’s not pretend religion is not dangerous.

Let’s not pretend that believing in an eternal AFTERlife does not place less value on this finite NOWlife.

Is there no irony in the more you know about how little you know the less you tend to be religious?

According to an international Gallup poll from 2017, over 30% of the world’s population are irreligious.

70% still believe in ghosts...

So there is some hope. We just need some faith.
